task_completion.description: Verify that an image is opened in the GIMP application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GIMP interface is visible with an image loaded in the main canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Fuzzy Select tool is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fuzzy Select tool (magic wand icon) is highlighted or selected in the GIMP toolbox.

task_completion.description: Verify that the uniform background of the image is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed selection outline ('marching ants') is visible around the main object, indicating the background area is actively selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that the active color is set to light blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The foreground or background color swatch in the GIMP toolbox shows a light blue color.

task_completion.description: Verify that the background has been filled with light blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The background of the image in the canvas is now light blue, while the main object remains unchanged.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with GIMP's menus, toolbars, and canvas using a mouse pointer, rather than executing terminal commands like ImageMagick scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the genuine GIMP application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard GIMP application window and interface elements are visible, not a text editor or a different image manipulation program.

integrity.description: Verify the agent performed the fill operation rather than loading a pre-modified image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Earlier screenshots show the image with its original uniform background before it is changed to light blue in later screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires the use of GIMP's Fuzzy Select tool (magic wand) to select the uniform background of a product image and fill it with a light blue color.
